sentences.arabic: كَانَ رَاعٍ اسْمُهُ نُوحٌ يَرْعَى الْغَنَمَ قُرْبَ النَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je pastir po imenu Nuh koji je čuvao ovce blizu rijeke.
sentences.translationEn: There was a shepherd named Nuh who tended sheep near the river.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى سَمَكَةً كَبِيرَةً عَلِقَتْ بَيْنَ الصُّخُورِ.
sentences.translation: Vidio je veliku ribu koja se zaglavila između stijena.
sentences.translationEn: He saw a large fish stuck between the rocks.

sentences.arabic: نَزَلَ إِلَى الْمَاءِ وَحَرَّكَ الصَّخْرَةَ بِيَدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ušao je u vodu i rukom je pomjerao stijenu.
sentences.translationEn: He went into the water and moved the rock with his hand.

sentences.arabic: انْطَلَقَتِ السَّمَكَةُ فِي الْمَاءِ وَنُوحٌ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهَا بِفَرَحٍ.
sentences.translation: Riba je uplovila u vodu a Nuh je radosno gledao za njom.
sentences.translationEn: The fish swam away in the water while Nuh watched it joyfully.
